hooks.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); const f=d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.file_path||''; if(!f.endsWith('.sh'))process.exit(0); const r=require('child_process').spawnSync('bash',['-n',f],{encoding:'utf8'}); if(r.status!==0){process.stderr.write('Shell syntax error in '+f+':\n'+r.stderr); process.exit(2);} process.exit(0);"
